leadText: The Roto Catch (Japanese: つかまえポン Roto Catch) is a Rotom Power introduced in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Bag item [ edit | edit source ]

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Bag item [ edit | edit source ] Games Description US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA One of the Rotom Powers. It increases the chance to catch Pokémon a lot. S V ZA One of the Rotom Powers. When used, it makes you far likelier to succeed at catching the wild Pokémon in the immediate area.
